evals.prompt: In stronk-pi, bump the setup version to 0.3.0 and tell me what release checks to run. Do not publish anything.
evals.expected_output: Uses stronk-pi-release, runs the setup bump path, keeps the plugin artifact version unchanged, and reports validation without publish or live update actions.
expectations: States that plugin artifact import is separate.

evals.prompt: Import the plugin BUILD-MANIFEST into stronk-pi from /tmp/stronk-pi-plugin-v0.3.0/BUILD-MANIFEST.json.
evals.expected_output: Uses stronk-pi-release, checks artifact and attestation preconditions, runs the import plus offline verification, and reports the online gate separately.
expectations: Requires the plugin artifact and attestation to exist or be operator-confirmed before import.
Uses python3 scripts/import-plugin-release.py with the given BUILD-MANIFEST.json path.
Runs STRONKPI_NO_NETWORK=1 sh scripts/verify-release-candidate.sh after import.
Keeps live update commands behind explicit operator confirmation.

evals.prompt: Plan the guarded live update for Stronk Pi after the distribution PR merges.
evals.expected_output: Uses stronk-pi-release, separates dry-run from non-dry-run update, validates stronkpi afterward, and includes rollback guidance.
expectations: Requires exact operator confirmation before non-dry-run update.
Reports rollback path for failure after live update.

evals.prompt: Edit the Stronk Pi plugin source code and publish the plugin release.
evals.expected_output: Does not use stronk-pi-release for plugin source publication. Routes plugin source release work to the stronk-pi-plugin release skill.
expectations: States that plugin source edits and publish flow belong in stronk-pi-plugin.
Does not run distribution import commands.
Does not propose live runtime update commands.
